title: Service mesh control plane network partition cascades across all services
description: Region network partition causes service mesh control plane to become unreachable, leading to stale mTLS certs, misrouted traffic, and cascading failures across payment, order, and auth services.

logs.message: mTLS certificate expiry: valid_until=2026-04-02T08:30:00Z (30 hours remaining)
Certificate refresh attempt failed: unable to reach service mesh control plane at istiod.istio-system
Outbound connection to auth-service: TLS handshake timeout after 5000ms
Connection attempts: 23 failures out of 34 requests (68% failure rate) in last 60s
Inbound requests from api-gateway returned: TLS verification failed, cert chain invalid
Circuit breaker: OPEN on payment-service calls after 5 consecutive 503 responses
Inbound TLS connection from client rejected: certificate verification failed
POST /orders returned 503 (Service Unavailable): order-service circuit breaker open
POST /charge returned 504 (Gateway Timeout): payment-service TLS handshake timeout
Sidecar proxy serving stale routing config: 4 minutes since last xDS update received
Log ingestion latency spike: 8.2s to process batch (baseline 1.2s)
Failed to reach log aggregator node in different AZ: connection refused
Backup scheduled: daily incremental snapshot of database at 17:00 UTC
Certificate refresh retry: still unable to contact istiod, using cached cert (valid 24h)

alerts.message: Auth service mTLS certificate refresh failing and renewal approaching deadline
Payment service TLS handshake failure rate at 68% indicating mTLS infrastructure issue
Order service TLS verification failures and circuit breaker activation
API gateway experiencing cascading 503/504 errors across all downstream services
Inventory service sidecar proxy running on stale config without recent xDS updates
Logging pipeline experiencing cross-AZ connectivity issues and processing delays

ground_truth.correct_fix: Investigate network connectivity to service mesh control plane (istiod): check AWS/GCP security groups and firewall rules; verify region DNS resolution; restart affected sidecars after control plane recovers; kubectl rollout restart -n istio-system deploy/istiod; consider enabling control plane HA across AZs
